name: TC-TXN-006 — Transaction List: Search by keyword "CONF-MAY26"
description:
Verifies keyword search on the transaction list endpoint.

**Endpoint:** GET /api/v1/transaction
**Params:** page=0, size=20, period=week, q=CONF-MAY26
**Expected:** HTTP 200 with a paginated list. Each returned record's transaction_confirmation_id should contain the search term "CONF-MAY26".
